programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan takes Shiro for a walk after playing with him. However, Shiro later eats the entirety of the meat Shin-chan's family had put aside for dinner.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae prepares a meal to eat but as she tries to do so, Shin-chan causes a nuisance by playing with the food and annoys her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Matsuzaka is out on a date with her boyfriend when Shin-chan turns up and interrupts them. As a result, Matsuzaka takes him home.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans out a diet she can follow to lose weight. However, her cravings get the better of her and she ends up overeating.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae comes across her old school uniform, she puts it on. However, the principal of the kindergarten notices this and embarrasses her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae wishes to knit a new sweater for Hiroshi and takes one of his old ones apart. However, with the wool, she ends up knitting a sweater for Shiro.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Without apprising his mother Misae, Shin-chan sneaks off to the girls' school attended by the Saitama Crimson Scorpions. Consequently, Misae scolds him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Whilst preparing to take a bath, Misae instructs Shin-chan to check if the temperature of the water is suitable. However, Shin-chan finds it challenging to do so.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After watching Misae cut a pair of pants short, Shin-chan impulsively ends up cutting all the clothes short when Misae steps out for a call.

programme.desc: When Hiroshi returns from work, he brings home his coworker's old fax machine. However, Shin-chan faxes his drawings to Hiroshi and a letter to a news station.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi and Misae take Shin-chan to visit the zoo but Shin-chan and Hiroshi are more keen on observing beautiful women instead of the zoo animals. Later, Shin-chan plays with a lemur.

programme.desc: Shin-chan shares an energy drink with Hiroshi after he decides to go to sleep early. Consequently, Hiroshi struggles with sleep.

programme.desc: On a rainy day when Hiroshi is at home, Shin-chan pesters him into playing hide and seek with him. However, when Hiroshi searches for Shin-chan, he cannot find him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan and his family watch a movie starring Kizakora, Shin-chan wins an opportunity to meet her and spend time with her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Hiroshi find fish eggs in the fridge and decide to eat them. However, despite enjoying their meal, they fall sick.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan, Misae and Hiroshi are joined by Shin-chan's grandparents to celebrate the New Year. Consequently, they eat their lunch and spend time together.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan scribbles on a wall, he is caught in the act by a security guard. However, despite her attempts to keep him in her custody, he escapes.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As Misae is about to go out, Shin-chan decides on a code for him and her. Later, when a courier arrives, Shin-chan pesters him and makes him use the code.

programme.desc: Shin-chan and Hiroshi go out on a ski trip during winter. However, they encounter a heavy snow storm which forces them to return home.

programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae coerces Shin-chan to do the dishes as punishment for hiding his lunch box in Shiro's house. However, Shin-chan messes up the kitchen.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi returns from work, he brings home his coworker's old fax machine. However, Shin-chan faxes his drawings to Hiroshi and a letter to a news station.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi and Misae take Shin-chan to visit the zoo but Shin-chan and Hiroshi are more keen on observing beautiful women instead of the zoo animals. Later, Shin-chan plays with a lemur.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan shares an energy drink with Hiroshi after he decides to go to sleep early. Consequently, Hiroshi struggles with sleep.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: On a rainy day when Hiroshi is at home, Shin-chan pesters him into playing hide and seek with him. However, when Hiroshi searches for Shin-chan, he cannot find him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi plans to train Shin-chan to become a baseball player. However, on the day of training he forgets Shin-chan and takes Shiro with him instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan and his family watch a movie starring Kizakora, Shin-chan wins an opportunity to meet her and spend time with her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Shin-chan take a trip to Osaka and board the bullet train to travel. However, they come across the principal of the kindergarten on the way.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Hiroshi find fish eggs in the fridge and decide to eat them. However, despite enjoying their meal, they fall sick.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan, Misae and Hiroshi are joined by Shin-chan's grandparents to celebrate the New Year. Consequently, they eat their lunch and spend time together.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan scribbles on a wall, he is caught in the act by a security guard. However, despite her attempts to keep him in her custody, he escapes.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As Misae is about to go out, Shin-chan decides on a code for him and her. Later, when a courier arrives, Shin-chan pesters him and makes him use the code.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and Hiroshi go out on a ski trip during winter. However, they encounter a heavy snow storm which forces them to return home.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan becomes sick, Misae buys medicine to help him get better and teaches him how to gargle. However, Shin-chan behaves mischievously.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the society does not have enough funds to celebrate the 'Ganesh Utsav', Tapu Sena comes up with a clever plan.

programme.desc: Tapu Sena and other members of the society welcome Lord Ganesha to Gokuldham society amidst great decoration and music.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Bhide and Hathi's performance impresses every member of the society, Popatlal gets a tricky task from Tapu Sena.

programme.desc: When Taarak gets a task to recite poetry, he renders a beautiful piece about the members. Later, Champaklal suddenly disappears.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Monty sees some goons kidnap his friend Annie and follows the kidnappers at a distance on his cycle. Meanwhile, Team CID discover the corpse of Annie's mother in her house.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: While trying to find a missing girl, Team CID realise that her colleagues are lying. Later, the office building collapses, almost killing Daya and reveals a mysterious tunnel below the structure.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The tattoo artist tricks the scammer into getting him to the studio.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Members of Gokuldham take Babban to Madhavi for identification. Later, everyone is shocked when Inspector Pandey arrives at the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Pandey is enraged to find Iyer and Jethalal in police uniform. He proposes to arrest them with scammer but Gokuldham members unanimously apologise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Dr Hathi arrives in a tempo and is unable to get off of it. Later, Babita gets excited about her birthday but gets disappointed when Iyer cannot celebrate with her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Babita learns that Iyer and all her loved ones are busy on her birthday, she feels upset. On the same day, Jethalal rushes to get a nice present for Babita when he assumes it is her birthday.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal reaches Babita's house to wish her assuming it is her birthday. However, chaos ensues when he leaks Iyer's surprise plans for her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal rushes to learn western dance forms when he learns about Babita's birthday party. Later, Daya feels devastated when the ladies of Gokuldham inform her about the party's invitation card.

programme.desc: As Babita's western birthday party approaches, the residents of Gokuldham Society begin preparing for the big day. Meanwhile, Jethalal gets unhappy when he does not receive the invitation card.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society excitedly prepare to participate in their very first cricket match. Rival captains Bhide and Jethalal choose their team members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Jethalal's teams receive flashy names and sponsors for Gokuldham Premier League and the preparations for the big cricket match begin.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Gokuldham Premier League approaches, the showdowns between Bhide and Jethalal's teams begin. They hold a meeting to discuss the rules of the grand match.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After he wears the sweater, Jethalal has to face many obstacles. His day at work also starts to get affected.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After a long and tiring day, Jethalal prays that he does not bump into any society members on his way home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal struggles with his situation, Bhide also begins to worry about Tapu Sena's upcoming final exam results.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is in a fix when everyone gathers at his house on learning about his condition. After they all offer different solutions, Dr Hathi gets ready to administer an injection.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the oath is now known to everyone in Gokuldham Society, Daya's mother offers a solution that's even tougher to follow.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu has a nightmare about getting only 40 percent on his exams. Everyone has to spend a restless night after he calls them up one by one and tells them about his worries.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone arrives at Bhide's house to check the exam results, but get anxious about the delay. Sunder arrives with some much-anticipated news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone applauds Bhide's teaching efforts for helping the children improve their results. Jethalal and Champaklal get an important phone call.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Nattu Kaka leaves Bagha, his nephew, to work for Jethalal at the shop. Later, Bagha is assigned to collect payment from Lachhuram.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal makes several calls in order to sell his paint boxes but all of his attempts fail. Later, he consults Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal worries about not being able to sell the paint boxes, and Daya steps in and sends him a potential client.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal plans to convince everyone to paint Gokuldham Society so he can sell the paint boxes to them, and Taarak decides to help him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide tells Tapu Sena there will be no money left to throw a New Year's party as all the money will be spent on painting the building.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After getting the green light for the New Year's party, Jethalal secretly tells the other men to meet up without their wives knowing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men are caught in the act as they try to throw their own party, and Champaklal teaches them a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide negotiates with Sakharam as they work on the contract for the building's paint job; Daya and Jethalal are glad a deal is made.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The renovation at Gokuldham society finally starts. However, chaos ensues when the society realises they spend all the fund halfway through renovation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sukharam is furious about the paint job contract and ends up ruining the job completely. Later, the residents have to come up with a solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone holds Jethalal responsible for the work Sukharam ruins; Champaklal proposes an idea after they fail to find a new contractor.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to fix the paint job gone wrong, and the finished work stuns them; Sukharam apologises to the residents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents agree to do Satyanarayan Puja ritual to celebrate the finished paint job; Nattu Kaka returns to Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal has secretly been planning a secret party in the evening, but everyone seems to have found out somehow, and they all await his party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents realise Champaklal's party is a Bhajan Party to thank God for his blessings and for making the paint job successful.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society is full of quirky neighbours who laugh, fight, and come together through every challenge. A mix of comedy, emotion, and strong community spirit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya, Madhavi, Komal, Anjali and Babita bring tiffins at Sodhi's place one by one. Bhide decides to go to Tapu Sena and ask about the Ganesh Utsav programme.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.
